title: Billing
description:
The accounting office is having troubling with billing each department for the supplies purchased last semester. Below is a chart of all the supplies and how much they cost. You must write a program that reads a list of the supplies and computes the total cost.

Item Cost
Paper 57.99
Printer 120.50
Planners 31.25
Binders 22.50
Calendar 10.95
Notebooks 11.20
Ink 66.95
input: The input is a list of office supplies with one item per line. End-of- input is denoted by the string “EOI”.
output: Print the total cost of all the items in the list. The output must start with a dollar sign, “$” and the total printed with exactly two decimal digits.

samples.input:
Binders
Calendar
Ink
Notebooks
Binders
Ink
EOI

source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2013, Novice
